subject: [RFC PATCH 33/40] PM: hibernate: walk per-superpageblock free lists in mark_free_pages

reviews.author: Rafael J. Wysocki
reviews.summary: Suggested breaking down the code into a separate function to make it easier to follow and understand. Proposed a specific refactoring approach.

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This RFC patch proposes a change to the hibernate function mark_free_pages() to walk per-superpageblock free lists instead of zone-level free lists after the superpage rework. The existing list_for_each_entry() walk is wrapped in an SPB iteration loop, and when the zone has no SPBs (e.g., unpopulated hotplug zone), it falls back to the zone-level free list. This change aims to prevent wasting image space and risking OOM during the snapshot.
